name: Worker (Derivatives)
description: Dedicated worker for asset derivative generation (thumbnail/preview ffmpeg), isolated from the MAIN worker with a low concurrency cap so a burst of generations can't pin every core and starve generation/API. Opt-in via settings.derivatives_dedicated_queue.

settings.description: Max concurrent ffmpeg derivative jobs (low: CPU-bound, keeps cores free for generation/API)
Job timeout in seconds (derivatives are short)
